name: chain_acquisition_launch_hn_voltair_yc_w26
method: [ACQUISITION] Launch HN: Voltair (YC W26) – Drone and charging network for power utilities

stages.task: Poll HN Algolia API for 'Launch HN' posts from last 24h, extract company name, URL, category, YC batch

Filter for YC W25/W26 companies in infrastructure, enterprise, B2B, utilities, government-adjacent verticals. Score EAS fit 0-10 based on: regulated industry (+3), B2B (+2), <50 employees (+2), no marketing hire visible (+3). Reject consumer apps, crypto, social.
For each qualified company: scrape their site, find founder LinkedIn, identify content/SEO gaps, check if they have a blog or social presence. Flag companies with zero content as highest priority.

Generate personalized cold email referencing their HN launch day (recency hook), their specific vertical, and one concrete gap (no blog, no case studies, no LinkedIn posts). Offer 2-week trial EAS engagement.
